📊 Pace Trends (Live Data)

AI Pick Analyst
Ask for matchup analysis and best props. The engine ranks picks from structured data only: game context, market line, trends, home/away splits, pace, injuries, and defensive matchup.
LIVE DATA
Game info: spread, total, pace
Props: line, odds, book
Context: injuries, lineups
Signals: L5/L10, splits, defense
Try “best player props for NBA tonight”, “analyze Lakers vs Suns”, or “find props with weak defensive matchups.” Results include recommendation, model edge, trend, matchup, pace/context, and risk notes.
Informational analysis only. Verify lines, injuries, and odds before placing any wager.

Welcome to PropEdge
Here's how to read your prop cards
  • ⭐ ULTIMATE Multi-factor lock: base rating 82+, L10 ≥ 70%, L5 ≥ 65% — all signals aligned
  • 🎯 PRIME Score 85+ — strong model signal with high recent hit rate
  • ✅ STRONG Score 72+ — solid edge with consistent recent performance
  • SOLID Score 62+ — decent value, use as part of a parlay
